feed.title: A simple backup scheme for wallet accounts

entry.title: A simple backup scheme for wallet accounts
entry.summary: The issue concerning LaTeX formulas that were previously functional but are now malfunctioning has been noted, especially since there is no current capability to modify the original post where these issues have arisen. For those interested in viewing the formulas as they were originally intended, a resource has been made available which can be accessed at [this link](https://delvingbitcoin.org/raw/1607). Additionally, it appears that the relevance of this problem may be diminishing as it could be considered outdated by more recent developments, particularly the proposal known as BIP138, spearheaded by @pyth. This proposal can be examined further at [BIP138 on GitHub](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/1951).
